title: Uttah Electronics marketing site with 3D animated experience

requirements.text: Create a responsive electronics company website named "Uttah Electronics" with a complete landing-page style structure (top navigation + key sections) suitable for a small brand presence.

quotes: Make a electronic website as name as Uttah Electronics

acceptanceCriteria: The site name "Uttah Electronics" appears in the header/nav and on the main hero area.
Layout is responsive and usable on mobile, tablet, and desktop widths.
Navigation links scroll/jump to corresponding sections (or route) without broken links.

requirements.text: Add coherent site sections for an electronics brand: Hero, Featured Categories, Featured Products (static sample catalog), About, and Contact.

quotes: Make a electronic website as name as Uttah Electronics

acceptanceCriteria: Each section is present and visually distinct with headings and body text in English.
Featured Products renders a grid/list of at least 6 sample products (name, short description, price label or "Request quote").
Contact section includes a form UI with fields (Name, Email, Message) and a non-error submit interaction (e.g., client-side confirmation).

requirements.text: Implement 3D animations on the website using Three.js via React Three Fiber: include a 3D hero scene and at least one additional animated 3D element/section transition effect.

quotes: and create also a 3D animations for websites.

acceptanceCriteria: A 3D canvas renders in the hero area and displays a clear electronics-themed 3D scene (e.g., abstract circuit board, rotating device silhouettes, or glowing components).
The 3D scene includes continuous animation (e.g., rotation, subtle floating, animated lights/particles).
The 3D content degrades gracefully on small screens/performance-limited devices (e.g., reduced effects or smaller canvas) without breaking the page.

requirements.text: Define and apply a consistent visual theme (colors, typography, spacing, component style) across the entire site with a distinct non-blue/non-purple aesthetic appropriate for a modern electronics brand.

quotes: Make a electronic website as name as Uttah Electronics

acceptanceCriteria: A single cohesive theme is applied across navigation, sections, buttons, and typography.
Theme avoids default-looking styling and is consistent across pages/sections.

constraints: Use English for any user-facing text.
Do not edit files under frontend/src/components/ui or any immutable paths listed in SYSTEM_CONTEXT; compose those components instead.
Keep backend as a single Motoko actor if backend changes are introduced.
nonGoals: Implementing a full e-commerce checkout system (cart, payments, order fulfillment).
Integrating third-party authentication providers (only Internet Identity is supported, and is not required by this request).
Using external databases or external real-time services.

required: Wordmark logo reading "Uttah Electronics" with a clean modern tech aesthetic (uttah-electronics-logo.dim_1024x256.png)
Square favicon icon with a simple electronics-themed mark (uttah-electronics-favicon.dim_256x256.png)
Abstract dark electronics/circuit pattern background texture (uttah-electronics-bg.dim_1920x1080.png)
